home.title: Soil Ecology & Conservation Lab
home.subtitle: Guangxi University
home.description: We focus on plant diversity–soil water-carbon coupling, soil organic carbon dynamics, soil erosion and conservation, and remote sensing-based monitoring. Our research integrates meta-analysis, field observations, and laboratory experiments across multiple scales.

people.title: People
people.noStudents: We are recruiting graduate students. Welcome to join us!

joinus.title: Join Us
joinus.subtitle: Welcome to Our Lab
joinus.welcome: Our lab is committed to cultivating students' innovation, research literacy, and practical skills, providing comprehensive guidance and rich research opportunities with a well-equipped platform and a collaborative team atmosphere.
